description_long: This lamp features a striking, flower-inspired design with multiple large, petal-like metallic elements radiating outward from a central axis. The petals are arranged in several layers, each slightly offset, creating a visually dynamic and sculptural form. The central stem is cylindrical and adorned with intricate, openwork metallic rings, adding both structural support and decorative flair. The base is square and robust, providing stability for the tall, elaborate upper structure. The color palette consists mainly of metallic bronze and dark gray, giving the lamp a modern yet elegant appearance. This lamp would serve as a dramatic focal point in urban parks, plazas, or upscale public spaces.
description: A tall, flower-shaped lamp with layered metallic petals and an ornate cylindrical stem, finished in bronze and dark gray. Its sculptural form and decorative details make it a striking urban feature.
description_view_0: The lamp's layered petals are clearly visible, radiating outward in a symmetrical, flower-like pattern, with the ornate stem and square base in full view.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the circular arrangement of the petals, showing their overlapping structure and the central axis more directly from the side.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle highlights the petal layers and the detailed stem, but from a slightly rotated perspective, revealing more of the petal curvature.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, focusing on the petal arrangement and the central stem, with the base and lower structure visible beneath the petals.
